basic_details.job_title: Railway RRC SECR Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 1644 Posts
basic_details.short_information: RRC SECR Recruitment 2026 offers 1644 new vacancies for Trade Apprentice posts. Eligible candidates with ITI can apply online from 05-05-2026 to 04-06-2026 through the official RRC SECR website, secr.indianrailways.gov.in.

how_to_apply: The application process is entirely online through the National Apprenticeship India portal. No physical copy of the application is to be sent to the DRM Office, Raipur Division, or Wagon Repair Shop, Raipur. Candidates must register on the portal, fill in all required details accurately, and upload soft/scanned copies of their recent passport-size colour photograph, signature, and all necessary documents pertaining to educational and technical qualification.
seo_tags: South East Central Railway Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026
